name: the resolver activates only namespaces that actually exist on the rule surface
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/resolve-technology.sh" Django 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'ns=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["activated_namespaces"]; real=Dir.glob("'"/home/user/claude-tdd-pro"'/generated-code-quality-standards/*").select{|p|File.directory?(p)}.map{|p|File.basename(p)}; exit((ns-real).empty? && !ns.empty? ? 0:1)' && echo activates-existing-only 1>&2
